# CandleView Lab Vendor Notice

This experimental bundle uses CandleView (`candleview` npm package), licensed under AGPL-3.0-only.

Source project: https://github.com/0xhappyboy/candleview

This bundle is used by `/chart-lab` and by `/us-screener`, where CandleView is an experimental fallback price-chart renderer. Keep AGPL-3.0-only obligations visible when shipping or distributing the web app, and keep local source modifications available with the deployed artifact.
